title: Public Bestowal of the Cacique Title
location: Main ritual plaza before assembled witnesses
situation: Highborn Atabey pronounces the consecrating formula—"By Cohoba, Corozal has its Cacique."—and completes the ceremonial transfer of authority.
knows: Ritual legitimacy has now been publicly conferred
The new Cacique is recognized under sacred authority
Atabey's role as bestower has been properly fulfilled within tradition
does_not_know: Whether recognition will translate into stable day-to-day rule
How quickly rivals may challenge the new leader
Long-term consequences of this specific succession choice
